overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic Japanese-inspired urban district. The character navigates from neon-lit commercial streets through narrow alleys, up concrete stairwells, across rooftops, and back down through bustling city streets with moderate traffic and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with Japanese signage

events.description: turns left from main street into narrow alleyway entrance

agents.ego_description: walking past bright neon signs and turning into a narrow alley between buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away in the distance down the street

entered.detail: large circular neon sign with Japanese text and pink spiral design
blue neon sign with Japanese characters and 'HO' visible
traditional red Japanese paper lanterns hanging above street
brightly lit vending machine with multiple colored panels
narrow passage between teal and green buildings with graffiti

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a vibrant cyberpunk commercial street lined with neon signage including a prominent Kiroshi sign and red paper lanterns. The character walks forward along the concrete sidewalk before turning left into a narrow alleyway entrance marked by green walls and scattered trash bags.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell between close building walls

events.description: enters enclosed concrete stairwell from open alley
continues ascending steep concrete stairs with metal railings

agents.ego_description: climbing multiple flights of concrete stairs between narrow building walls

entered.detail: steep concrete stairs with shadow patterns from overhead structures
metal pipe railings along the stair edges
red painted wall with large white graffiti art and tags
traditional paper lanterns suspended above the stair landing

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed stairwell between buildings, leaving the neon-lit street behind. The environment shifts to concrete walls with graffiti and metal railings as the character ascends the steep stairs in mixed lighting conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop vending area with city skyline views

events.description: emerges from dark stairwell into bright direct sunlight
exits enclosed stairs onto open rooftop walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along rooftop past vending machines with expansive city skyline visible in background

notable_agents.action: sitting at small table near vending machines on the rooftop

entered.detail: cluster of vending machines and small seating area on concrete rooftop
distant futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings under clear sky
crisscrossing electrical wires and cables spanning between buildings
string of red paper lanterns hanging overhead across the rooftop

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell into bright sunlight, the scene opens onto a rooftop vending area with a stunning view of the distant city skyline. The character walks past vending machines and red lanterns while a lone NPC sits at a nearby table, with power lines crisscrossing overhead against the clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban street with commercial storefronts

events.description: black and white car drives past on the right side of the street
crosses the street while navigating around vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking down city street, navigating past outdoor cafe seating and crossing the road with traffic

notable_agents.action: black and white retro-futuristic car driving past the character
group of people sitting at outdoor cafe tables in front of teal building

entered.detail: green neon sign with 'KABU' text marking the district entrance
multi-story building with teal facade and Japanese signage
elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the street
painted white and yellow pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character descends to street level and walks through the Kabuki district, passing by a teal commercial building with outdoor cafe seating. The scene features moderate pedestrian activity and vehicle traffic, including a distinctive black and white car that drives past as the character crosses the street beneath an elevated highway structure.

events.description: enters shadowed area beneath large concrete highway overpass
turns right at intersection under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the highway overpass and turning right at the intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the street ahead at the intersection

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure casting shadows over the street
tall red-brown residential building with multiple balconies
broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character moves into the shadow of a massive highway overpass, where the lighting becomes diffused and sheltered. Walking past a red apartment block, the character turns right at an intersection marked by a broad yellow crosswalk, with sparse pedestrian activity in the covered urban space.

events.description: enters narrow alleyway between close building walls
descends stairs into lower level courtyard area

agents.ego_description: navigating down narrow passages and descending stairs into a lower courtyard

entered.detail: close concrete walls with green graffiti and utility fixtures
concrete steps leading down between building structures
blue and white garbage bags stacked along the alley wall
elevated walkway or bridge connecting buildings above the alley

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a narrow enclosed alley with close concrete walls covered in graffiti. The character descends stairs past piled trash bags into a lower courtyard area, with an overhead walkway visible above. The lighting becomes darker and more sheltered as the character moves deeper into the urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district through elevated urban spaces and back down into the shadowed depths of a city canyon. It begins on a bustling sidewalk adorned with Kiroshi signs and red lanterns before turning into a narrow alley and ascending a graffiti-covered concrete stairwell. As the character emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens into the bright sunlight of a rooftop vending area overlooking a distant skyline under a clear blue sky. The camera then descends back to street level through the Kabuki district, passing teal buildings and moving beneath a massive highway overpass where the light becomes diffused and sheltered. Finally, the environment shifts back into a narrow, enclosed alley, descending past piled trash bags and graffiti-covered walls into a dark, sheltered lower courtyard.
